source.title: PDD Holdings Quarterly Earnings + SEC EDGAR XBRL

extractions.claim: PDD FY2024 operating margin was 27.5%, with gross margin of 60.9% -- consistent with a pure marketplace model
extractions.evidence: FY2024: Revenue RMB 393.8B, Cost of revenue RMB 153.9B, Gross profit RMB 239.9B, Gross margin 60.9%. Operating income RMB 108.4B, Operating margin 27.5%. FY2023: Revenue RMB 247.6B, Operating income RMB 58.7B, Operating margin 23.7%. FY2022: Revenue RMB 130.6B, Operating income RMB 30.4B, Operating margin 23.3%.

verification.verifier_notes: FY2024 operating margin improved from 23.7% to 27.5% due to operating leverage as revenue scaled +59%

extractions.claim: Operating margin declined sharply in 2025 as PDD invested heavily in merchant support: Q1 2025 16.8%, Q2 2025 24.8%, Q3 2025 23.1%

verification.verifier_notes: Computed from quarterly earnings releases. Q1 2025 margin compression driven by 43% increase in sales and marketing expenses.

extractions.claim: PDD's net income margin was 28.5% in FY2024, higher than operating margin due to massive interest income contribution
extractions.evidence: FY2024: Net income RMB 112.4B / Revenue RMB 393.8B = 28.5% net margin. Operating margin was 27.5%. The 1.0pp uplift comes from RMB 20.55B investment income + RMB 3.12B other income, partially offset by RMB ~20.3B income tax.

verification.verifier_notes: XBRL: Pre-tax income RMB 132.7B = Operating income RMB 108.4B + Investment income RMB 20.55B + Other income RMB 3.12B + Equity method income RMB 0.02B.
